message:
test(cli): add unit tests for activity formatting functions

Add tests for stateIcon and formatActivityDuration:
- stateIcon: 8 test cases covering all states + edge cases
- formatActivityDuration: 13 test cases covering seconds, minutes, hours

Part of bd-jxs5b
